summary: Iteration 2 testing: 3 new feature surfaces (intake-load endpoint, admin dashboard with PATCH status, /insights/:slug detail pages). All 16 backend pytest tests pass (8 new + 8 pre-existing). All 14 frontend test points pass via Playwright on the public preview URL. Em-dash policy enforced: 0 em-dashes detected on /, /insights, /insights/quality-is-expected-strategy-is-rare, /admin?token=...
critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH endpoint accepts body as raw dict — works but a Pydantic StatusUpdate model would give automatic 422 on missing/non-string status and clearer OpenAPI docs.

Admin.jsx stores the admin token in the URL query string (?token=...) which means the secret can leak to browser history, server logs, and Referer headers if the admin clicks any external link from the page. Acceptable for a closed admin tool but worth documenting. localStorage + form-only entry would be safer.
InsightDetail.jsx 'next' wraps around the array circularly — fine, but UX could prefer 'no next' on the last article. Minor.
intake_load comparison uses ISO string $gte against created_at which is also stored as ISO string — works correctly because ISO 8601 sorts lexically. OK.
Logger ordering note from iteration_1 still applies but is non-blocking (logger is now defined before any route uses it on lines 25-29 — actually verified this is correct in current server.py).
test_credentials: Admin token: kokowa-admin-2026 (from backend/.env ADMIN_TOKEN). Verified valid via PATCH/GET 200 responses; invalid/missing tokens correctly return 401.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_-prefixed application records created during pytest runs (TEST_admin_sample, TEST_patch_target, TEST_persist, TEST_applicant). Recorded in MongoDB applications collection. The intake-load counter currently reports 11 in_review_this_week, 1 remaining_slots_this_month (because count exceeded 6 — note: remaining is correctly clamped to min 1 by max(1, monthly_slots - month_count)). Recommend periodic cleanup of TEST_-prefixed records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite is now split into test_kokowa_api.py (MVP) and test_kokowa_admin.py (iteration 2 admin/intake). Both run together via `pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Admin token is loaded from backend/.env via load_dotenv inside test_kokowa_admin.py. Frontend Playwright flows covered: home Scarcity intake-load pill, /insights 4 cards + click-through, /insights/:slug full render (title/cover/h2s/next/apply), invalid slug redirect, /admin token gate, /admin?token=... full list+filter+drawer+qualified mutation+refresh persistence, and em-dash strict check (0) on all 4 surfaces. The /admin page intentionally renders with NO marketing <header>/<footer> — verified.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. All new endpoints and pages behave as specified. The remaining_slots_this_month=1 floor is by design (max(1, monthly_slots - month_count)) so the public pill never shows 0 or negative.
